systemicity: Systemic (enhances nutrient uptake through roots and leaves)
mode_of_action_summary: Humic acid improves soil structure, increases nutrient availability, and enhances root development. It stimulates microbial activity and improves plant metabolism, helping crops absorb nutrients efficiently and withstand stress.

active_ingredients.name: Humic Acid
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Enhances nutrient uptake, root growth, and soil fertility

application_details.method: Mix with water and apply through irrigation or spray
application_details.coverage: Ensure application in root zone or full foliar coverage

resistance_management.advantage: Improves long-term soil health and plant growth
resistance_management.advice: Use regularly as part of nutrient program

multilingual_description.english: Liquid humic acid bio-stimulant for improving soil fertility and plant growth.
multilingual_description.urdu: ہیومک ایسڈ والی مائع کھاد جو زمین کی زرخیزی اور پودے کی نشوونما بہتر بناتی ہے۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: ہیومک ایسڈ والی مائع کھاد جو زمین دی زرخیزی تے پودے دی وڈھائی بہتر کردی اے۔

embedding_text: Impose liquid humic acid is used to improve soil fertility root development and nutrient absorption in crops. It enhances plant growth and increases yield.
